goal: Implement all auth-protected routes and mutation hooks
summary: Phase 3 finished. Created 7 auth-protected SPA routes with beforeLoad session gating. Added useMarkNotificationRead, useCreateAction, useBookmarks, useResearchCategory hooks. Integrated gated CTA returnUrl redirects in 5 public routes (research, forum, actions, actions/$id, index). Full project type-checks cleanly with zero errors.
stepSummaries:
1. Create first batch of auth-protected route files: /profile/$id (view/edit profile), /notifications (inbox), /settings (account settings). [verified]
  2. Create second batch of auth-protected route files: /bookmarks, /research/propose, /forum/new, /actions/register. [verified]
  3. Add gated CTA redirect logic (returnUrl) to protected action entry points across auth routes. [verified]
  4. Run TypeScript type check to confirm auth routes compile cleanly. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1: Created profile/$id.tsx, notifications.tsx, settings.tsx with auth gating. Step 2: Created bookmarks.tsx, research/propose.tsx, forum/new.tsx, actions/register.tsx. Step 3: Added returnUrl CTA redirects across 5 public routes. Step 4: tsc --noEmit passes with 0 errors.
gateVerdicts.rationale: All 4 steps had real verification: tsc, vite build, or file existence checks covered the load-bearing correctness. No steps were purely proxy.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Phase 3 goal: 'Implement all auth-protected routes and mutation hooks'. All 7 auth-protected SPA routes exist (profile/$id, notifications, settings, bookmarks, research/propose, forum/new, actions/register). Gated CTA logic redirects unauthenticated users to login with returnUrl. Mutation hooks updated. TypeScript compiles cleanly.
gateVerdicts.rationale: All required auth routes are present. CTA gating satisfies the blueprint's requirement that gated entry points redirect to /auth/login?returnUrl=. TypeScript compilation confirms technical correctness.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Nothing deferred. All planned work for auth SPA routes completed within the 4 steps.
gateVerdicts.rationale: No deferred items. Admin routes will be handled in Phase 4.
